headline: ONE SIGNATURE RELEASES THE BATCH
subheading: Inside the Qualified Person role: the personal legal accountability behind every certified medicine reaching patients.
flux_prompt: An abstract editorial concept of pharmaceutical batch certification and release authority, a single luminous teal certification mark glowing at the convergence point of flowing data streams, a stylised quality gate rendered as a sleek arc of light controlling passage from a deep navy assurance pipeline, abstract rows of analytical data points and batch records dissolving into clean geometric ribbons, a polished glass vial and abstract pharmaceutical capsule forms suspended in cool cyan light, layered translucent panels suggesting documents and certificates of analysis without any readable text, a subtle fresh-green indicator pulse marking the moment of approval, deep navy background with teal and cyan gradients, premium clinical-luxury atmosphere, soft directional lighting from the left, shallow depth of field, sense of singular accountability and trusted decision, 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
